---
title: 'catalog schema'
---

Show the schema(s) for a catalog entry. Bound entries print a single output
schema; unbound (partial) entries print both an input and an output schema.

## Usage

```bash
xorq catalog schema <name> [OPTIONS]
```

## Arguments

- **`name`** — Entry name **or** alias.

## Options

| Option | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `--json` | off | Print the entry's metadata as JSON instead of the formatted schema. |

## Examples

```bash
$ xorq catalog schema penguins-prod
Type: Source (bound)

Schema Out:
  species                 string
  island                  string
  bill_length_mm          float64
  bill_depth_mm           float64
  ...
```

JSON form (machine-readable):
```bash
xorq catalog schema penguins-prod --json
```

## See also

- [`catalog show`](show.qmd) — full metadata for an entry
- [`catalog list`](list.qmd) — list available entries
